category_sources: source_facts.description says "Dolt for Postgres" and official Doltgres docs describe it as a Postgres-compatible version of Dolt.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to dolthub/doltgresql; official docs use the name DoltgreSQL and note Doltgres as the short name.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/dolthub/doltgresql, so repo lookup was intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official Doltgres documentation support Postgres-compatible database and CLI tags.
